text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One morning, while I'm in my room getting ready
for the day...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Morning, Trainer! Wakey wakey!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clack.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hehe, good mooorning!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Heehee... Why do you think? Isn't it obvious?!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you a hint: it's gonna make you
super-duper happy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: I mean, it can't possibly not make you happy since it came out so well! I used my spare carrots and everything!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I made sure not to eat all of 'em so I could
make it!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! I can't keep it a secret anymore! Okay,
here you go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah! I present to you... Urara-brand chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Haru Urara hands me some surprisingly—or
rather, impressively—orange chocolate.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Whaddaya think? Looks tasty, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Valentine's Day is when we're supposed to give
chocolate to people who are close to us!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
That's why I worked real hard last night making
this for you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I mashed the carrots, then whipped and whirled
'em into the chocolate!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I thought you'd like carrot chocolate over plain
ol' chocolate. You do, right?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, it's my pleasure!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I'm thinking of taking some to the people in the
shopping district, too!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Do you wanna come with? I bet everyone'll be
happy to see you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Yay! Okay, let's go!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I made everyone's chocolates super special! I
matched the flavors to the stores they work at!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I added veggies for the supermarket lady, fish for
the fishmonger, and meat for the butcher!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Riiight? I can't wait to see their reactions!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Haru Urara and I spend a busy
Valentine's Day in the shopping district together.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Try a bite! It'll knock your socks off!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: At Haru Urara's insistence, I take a nibble.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ♪ You'd never guess it, but there's a
secret to why it's so yummy!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
It's the toppest of top secrets! But if you really
wanna know, I'll tell you.

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So? Do you wanna know?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I knew you couldn't resist! Here, come
closer!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: So what I did was...

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
I poured aaall my love into the chocolate while
thinking of how happy I wanted to make you!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ It seems my hard work paid off!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
You'll share some of that with me as thanks for
telling you my secret, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Haru Urara and I spend the rest of the
day in bliss while sharing her chocolates.
